parameters.toolDescription: Use para reler o contato atual com dados seguros e atualizados. Nao retorna dados privados de outras pessoas nem detalhes internos de precificacao.
parameters.query:
WITH current_person AS (
  SELECT p.*
  FROM public.people p
  WHERE (
    NULLIF('{{ $json.person_id || '' }}', '') IS NOT NULL
    AND p.id = NULLIF('{{ $json.person_id || '' }}', '')::uuid
  )
  OR (
    NULLIF('{{ $json.phone || '' }}', '') IS NOT NULL
    AND p.primary_phone = NULLIF('{{ $json.phone || '' }}', '')
  )
  ORDER BY CASE
    WHEN NULLIF('{{ $json.person_id || '' }}', '') IS NOT NULL
      AND p.id = NULLIF('{{ $json.person_id || '' }}', '')::uuid THEN 0
    ELSE 1
  END
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  cp.id,
  cp.full_name,
  cp.primary_phone,
  cp.email,
  cp.crm_funnel_id,
  cp.crm_status,
  COALESCE(cp.metadata->>'latest_real_estate_intent', cp.metadata->'lead_profile'->>'intent') AS intent,
  cp.metadata->'lead_profile' AS lead_profile,
  cp.metadata->>'whatsapp_profile_name' AS whatsapp_profile_name,
  cp.metadata->>'whatsapp_profile_status' AS whatsapp_profile_status,
  COALESCE((
    SELECT jsonb_agg(note->>'content')
    FROM jsonb_array_elements(COALESCE(cp.metadata->'lead_notes', '[]'::jsonb)) AS note
    WHERE COALESCE(note->>'visibility', '') = 'ai'
  ), '[]'::jsonb) AS notes_ai
FROM current_person cp;

parameters.toolDescription: Use para listar os imoveis ativos ja vinculados ao contato atual com dados seguros para atendimento comercial. Tambem retorna cover_image e public_url quando existirem; use quando o lead pedir fotos ou material visual de um imovel ja vinculado.
parameters.query:
WITH current_person AS (
  SELECT p.*
  FROM public.people p
  WHERE (
    NULLIF('{{ $json.person_id || '' }}', '') IS NOT NULL
    AND p.id = NULLIF('{{ $json.person_id || '' }}', '')::uuid
  )
  OR (
    NULLIF('{{ $json.phone || '' }}', '') IS NOT NULL
    AND p.primary_phone = NULLIF('{{ $json.phone || '' }}', '')
  )
  ORDER BY CASE
    WHEN NULLIF('{{ $json.person_id || '' }}', '') IS NOT NULL
      AND p.id = NULLIF('{{ $json.person_id || '' }}', '')::uuid THEN 0
    ELSE 1
  END
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  p.id AS property_id,
  p.title,
  p.slug,
  'https://www.novian.com.br/imoveis/' || COALESCE(NULLIF(p.slug, ''), p.id::text) AS public_url,
  p.address,
  p.price,
  p.status,
  LEFT(COALESCE(p.description, ''), 220) AS description,
  CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.cover_image, '') ~* '^https?://' THEN p.cover_image ELSE NULL END AS cover_image,
  p.custom_data->>'built_area' AS built_area,
  p.custom_data->>'land_area' AS land_area,
  p.custom_data->>'bedrooms' AS bedrooms,
  p.custom_data->>'bathrooms' AS bathrooms,
  p.custom_data->>'suites' AS suites,
  p.custom_data->>'parking' AS parking,
  p.custom_data->>'property_type' AS property_type,
  p.custom_data->>'neighborhood' AS neighborhood,
  p.custom_data->>'city' AS city,
  p.custom_data->>'condominium_fee' AS condominium_fee,
  p.custom_data->>'iptu' AS iptu,
  p.custom_data->>'floor' AS floor,
  p.custom_data->>'furnished' AS furnished,
  p.custom_data->>'amenities' AS amenities,
  pp.relationship_type,
  pp.notes,
  pp.source
FROM current_person cp
JOIN public.person_properties pp ON pp.person_id = cp.id
JOIN public.properties p ON p.id = pp.property_id
WHERE p.status = 'active'
ORDER BY pp.updated_at DESC
LIMIT 10;

parameters.toolDescription: Use para buscar imoveis ativos com filtros comerciais seguros. Retorna apenas dados publicos, incluindo cover_image e public_url quando existirem, e nunca detalhes internos de precificacao.
parameters.query:
WITH filters AS (
  SELECT
    NULLIF(BTRIM('{{ $fromAI("query_text", "Termo geral para busca livre, como bairro, nome do imovel ou preferencia do lead", "string") }}'), '') AS query_text,
    NULLIF(BTRIM('{{ $fromAI("city", "Cidade desejada; opcional", "string") }}'), '') AS city,
    NULLIF(BTRIM('{{ $fromAI("neighborhood", "Bairro ou regiao desejada; opcional", "string") }}'), '') AS neighborhood,
    NULLIF(BTRIM('{{ $fromAI("property_type", "Tipo do imovel; opcional", "string") }}'), '') AS property_type,
    CASE
      WHEN NULLIF(BTRIM('{{ $fromAI("min_price", "Preco minimo em numero inteiro; opcional", "string") }}'), '') ~ '^[0-9]+$'
      THEN NULLIF(BTRIM('{{ $fromAI("min_price", "Preco minimo em numero inteiro; opcional", "string") }}'), '')::numeric
      ELSE NULL
    END AS min_price,
    CASE
      WHEN NULLIF(BTRIM('{{ $fromAI("max_price", "Preco maximo em numero inteiro; opcional", "string") }}'), '') ~ '^[0-9]+$'
      THEN NULLIF(BTRIM('{{ $fromAI("max_price", "Preco maximo em numero inteiro; opcional", "string") }}'), '')::numeric
      ELSE NULL
    END AS max_price,
    CASE
      WHEN NULLIF(BTRIM('{{ $fromAI("bedrooms_min", "Minimo de quartos em numero inteiro; opcional", "string") }}'), '') ~ '^[0-9]+$'
      THEN NULLIF(BTRIM('{{ $fromAI("bedrooms_min", "Minimo de quartos em numero inteiro; opcional", "string") }}'), '')::int
      ELSE NULL
    END AS bedrooms_min,
    CASE
      WHEN NULLIF(BTRIM('{{ $fromAI("bathrooms_min", "Minimo de banheiros em numero inteiro; opcional", "string") }}'), '') ~ '^[0-9]+$'
      THEN NULLIF(BTRIM('{{ $fromAI("bathrooms_min", "Minimo de banheiros em numero inteiro; opcional", "string") }}'), '')::int
      ELSE NULL
    END AS bathrooms_min,
    CASE
      WHEN NULLIF(BTRIM('{{ $fromAI("parking_min", "Minimo de vagas em numero inteiro; opcional", "string") }}'), '') ~ '^[0-9]+$'
      THEN NULLIF(BTRIM('{{ $fromAI("parking_min", "Minimo de vagas em numero inteiro; opcional", "string") }}'), '')::int
      ELSE NULL
    END AS parking_min,
    CASE
      WHEN NULLIF(BTRIM('{{ $fromAI("limit", "Quantidade maxima de resultados entre 1 e 8; opcional", "string") }}'), '') ~ '^[0-9]+$'
      THEN LEAST(GREATEST(NULLIF(BTRIM('{{ $fromAI("limit", "Quantidade maxima de resultados entre 1 e 8; opcional", "string") }}'), '')::int, 1), 8)
      ELSE 5
    END AS requested_limit
)
SELECT
  p.id,
  p.title,
  p.slug,
  'https://www.novian.com.br/imoveis/' || COALESCE(NULLIF(p.slug, ''), p.id::text) AS public_url,
  p.address,
  p.price,
  p.status,
  LEFT(COALESCE(p.description, ''), 220) AS description,
  CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.cover_image, '') ~* '^https?://' THEN p.cover_image ELSE NULL END AS cover_image,
  p.custom_data->>'built_area' AS built_area,
  p.custom_data->>'land_area' AS land_area,
  p.custom_data->>'bedrooms' AS bedrooms,
  p.custom_data->>'bathrooms' AS bathrooms,
  p.custom_data->>'suites' AS suites,
  p.custom_data->>'parking' AS parking,
  p.custom_data->>'property_type' AS property_type,
  p.custom_data->>'neighborhood' AS neighborhood,
  p.custom_data->>'city' AS city,
  p.custom_data->>'condominium_fee' AS condominium_fee,
  p.custom_data->>'iptu' AS iptu,
  p.custom_data->>'floor' AS floor,
  p.custom_data->>'furnished' AS furnished,
  p.custom_data->>'amenities' AS amenities
FROM public.properties p
CROSS JOIN filters f
WHERE p.status = 'active'
  AND (
    f.query_text IS NULL
    OR CONCAT_WS(' ', p.title, p.slug, p.address, LEFT(COALESCE(p.description, ''), 220), p.custom_data->>'neighborhood', p.custom_data->>'city', p.custom_data->>'property_type') ILIKE '%' || f.query_text || '%'
  )
  AND (f.city IS NULL OR COALESCE(p.custom_data->>'city', '') ILIKE '%' || f.city || '%')
  AND (f.neighborhood IS NULL OR COALESCE(p.custom_data->>'neighborhood', '') ILIKE '%' || f.neighborhood || '%')
  AND (f.property_type IS NULL OR COALESCE(p.custom_data->>'property_type', '') ILIKE '%' || f.property_type || '%')
  AND (f.min_price IS NULL OR p.price >= f.min_price)
  AND (f.max_price IS NULL OR p.price <= f.max_price)
  AND (
    f.bedrooms_min IS NULL
    OR COALESCE(NULLIF(regexp_replace(COALESCE(p.custom_data->>'bedrooms', ''), '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), ''), '0')::int >= f.bedrooms_min
  )
  AND (
    f.bathrooms_min IS NULL
    OR COALESCE(NULLIF(regexp_replace(COALESCE(p.custom_data->>'bathrooms', ''), '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), ''), '0')::int >= f.bathrooms_min
  )
  AND (
    f.parking_min IS NULL
    OR COALESCE(NULLIF(regexp_replace(COALESCE(p.custom_data->>'parking', ''), '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), ''), '0')::int >= f.parking_min
  )
ORDER BY
  CASE
    WHEN f.query_text IS NOT NULL AND (COALESCE(p.title, '') ILIKE '%' || f.query_text || '%' OR COALESCE(p.slug, '') ILIKE '%' || f.query_text || '%') THEN 0
    ELSE 1
  END,
  p.updated_at DESC
LIMIT (SELECT requested_limit FROM filters);

parameters.toolDescription: Use para obter todos os detalhes publicos e seguros de um imovel especifico citado pelo lead. A referencia pode ser id, slug, titulo ou endereco. Retorna descricao completa, resumo em texto, caracteristicas, taxas, dados publicos da landing page, imagens publicas quando existirem e public_url; use antes de responder sobre fotos, imagens, material visual ou detalhes completos do imovel.
parameters.query:
WITH ref AS (
  SELECT NULLIF(BTRIM('{{ $fromAI("reference", "Referencia do imovel: id, slug, titulo ou endereco citado pelo lead", "string") }}'), '') AS reference
), matched_properties AS (
  SELECT p.*
  FROM public.properties p
  CROSS JOIN ref
  WHERE p.status = 'active'
    AND ref.reference IS NOT NULL
    AND (
      p.id::text = ref.reference
      OR COALESCE(p.slug, '') ILIKE ref.reference
      OR COALESCE(p.slug, '') ILIKE '%' || ref.reference || '%'
      OR COALESCE(p.title, '') ILIKE '%' || ref.reference || '%'
      OR COALESCE(p.address, '') ILIKE '%' || ref.reference || '%'
    )
), sanitized AS (
  SELECT
    p.*,
    COALESCE(p.custom_data, '{}'::jsonb) AS custom_data_safe_source,
    COALESCE(p.landing_page, '{}'::jsonb) AS landing_page_safe_source,
    NULLIF(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(p.description, ''), '<[^>]+>', ' ', 'g'), '\s+', ' ', 'g'), '') AS description_plain_source
  FROM matched_properties p
)
SELECT
  p.id,
  p.title,
  p.slug,
  'https://www.novian.com.br/imoveis/' || COALESCE(NULLIF(p.slug, ''), p.id::text) AS public_url,
  p.address,
  p.price,
  p.status,
  COALESCE(p.description, '') AS description,
  p.description_plain_source AS description_plain,
  CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.cover_image, '') ~* '^https?://' THEN p.cover_image ELSE NULL END AS cover_image,
  COALESCE((
    SELECT jsonb_agg(image_url)
    FROM (
      SELECT image_url
      FROM unnest(COALESCE(p.images, ARRAY[]::text[])) AS image_url
      WHERE COALESCE(image_url, '') ~* '^https?://'
    ) visible_images
  ), '[]'::jsonb) AS images,
  COALESCE(array_length(p.images, 1), 0) AS image_count,
  CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.map_embed_url, '') ~* '^https?://' THEN p.map_embed_url ELSE NULL END AS map_embed_url,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(p.custom_data_safe_source->>'built_area', ''), NULLIF(p.custom_data_safe_source->>'area', '')) AS built_area,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(p.custom_data_safe_source->>'land_area', ''), NULLIF(p.custom_data_safe_source->>'terrain_area', '')) AS land_area,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(p.custom_data_safe_source->>'bedrooms', ''), (regexp_match(COALESCE(p.description_plain_source, ''), '([0-9]+)\s+dormit[oó]rios', 'i'))[1]) AS bedrooms,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(p.custom_data_safe_source->>'bathrooms', ''), (regexp_match(COALESCE(p.description_plain_source, ''), '([0-9]+)\s+banheiros?', 'i'))[1]) AS bathrooms,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(p.custom_data_safe_source->>'suites', ''), (regexp_match(COALESCE(p.description_plain_source, ''), '([0-9]+)\s+su[ií]te', 'i'))[1]) AS suites,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(p.custom_data_safe_source->>'parking', ''), NULLIF(p.custom_data_safe_source->>'garage_spaces', ''), (regexp_match(COALESCE(p.description_plain_source, ''), '([0-9]+)\s+vaga', 'i'))[1]) AS parking,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(p.custom_data_safe_source->>'property_type', ''), NULLIF(p.custom_data_safe_source->>'type', ''), NULLIF(split_part(COALESCE(p.title, ''), ' - ', 1), '')) AS property_type,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(p.custom_data_safe_source->>'neighborhood', ''), NULLIF(p.custom_data_safe_source->>'bairro', ''), NULLIF((regexp_match(COALESCE(p.address, ''), 'Bairro\s+([^,]+)', 'i'))[1], '')) AS neighborhood,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(p.custom_data_safe_source->>'city', ''), NULLIF(p.custom_data_safe_source->>'cidade', ''), NULLIF((regexp_match(COALESCE(p.address, ''), ',\s*([^,]+)\s*-\s*[A-Z]{2}$'))[1], '')) AS city,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(p.custom_data_safe_source->>'condominium_fee', ''), NULLIF(p.custom_data_safe_source->>'hoa_fee', ''), NULLIF((regexp_match(COALESCE(p.description_plain_source, ''), 'Condomínio[^0-9]{0,120}([0-9]{1,3}(?:\.[0-9]{3})*,[0-9]{2}|[0-9]+(?:,[0-9]{2})?)', 'i'))[1], '')) AS condominium_fee,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(p.custom_data_safe_source->>'iptu', ''), NULLIF((regexp_match(COALESCE(p.description_plain_source, ''), 'IPTU[^0-9]{0,120}([0-9]{1,3}(?:\.[0-9]{3})*,[0-9]{2}|[0-9]+(?:,[0-9]{2})?)', 'i'))[1], '')) AS iptu,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(p.custom_data_safe_source->>'floor', ''), NULLIF((regexp_match(COALESCE(p.description_plain_source, ''), '([0-9]+)[ºo]\s+andar', 'i'))[1], '')) AS floor,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(p.custom_data_safe_source->>'furnished', ''), CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.description_plain_source, '') ~* 'mobiliad[oa]' THEN 'true' ELSE NULL END) AS furnished,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(p.custom_data_safe_source->>'amenities', ''),
    NULLIF(
      array_to_string(
        array_remove(
          ARRAY[
            CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.description_plain_source, '') ~* 'cooktop' THEN 'cooktop' END,
            CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.description_plain_source, '') ~* 'box de vidro' THEN 'box de vidro temperado' END,
            CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.description_plain_source, '') ~* 'planejad' THEN 'moveis planejados' END,
            CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.description_plain_source, '') ~* 'água e gás' OR COALESCE(p.description_plain_source, '') ~* 'agua e gas' THEN 'agua e gas inclusos' END,
            CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.description_plain_source, '') ~* 'garagem coberta' THEN 'vaga coberta' END
          ],
          NULL
        ),
        ', '
      ),
      ''
    )
  ) AS amenities,
  p.landing_page_safe_source->>'heroTitle' AS hero_title,
  p.landing_page_safe_source->>'heroSubtitle' AS hero_subtitle,
  p.landing_page_safe_source->>'callToActionText' AS call_to_action_text,
  p.landing_page_safe_source->>'leadMagnetTitle' AS lead_magnet_title,
  p.landing_page_safe_source->>'leadMagnetFileUrl' AS lead_magnet_file_url,
  p.landing_page_safe_source->>'primaryColor' AS primary_color,
  COALESCE((p.landing_page_safe_source->>'showLeadMagnet')::boolean, false) AS show_lead_magnet,
  (p.custom_data_safe_source - 'owner_price' - 'commission_rate') AS safe_custom_data,
  p.landing_page_safe_source AS landing_page
FROM sanitized p
ORDER BY
  CASE WHEN p.id::text = (SELECT reference FROM ref) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
  CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.slug, '') ILIKE (SELECT reference FROM ref) THEN 1 ELSE 2 END,
  p.updated_at DESC
LIMIT 5;

parameters.toolDescription: Use para atualizar imediatamente campos estruturados e seguros do contato atual, como nome, email, intencao e etapa. Nao use para notas internas extensas nem para dados de outras pessoas.
parameters.query:
WITH current_person AS (
  SELECT p.*
  FROM public.people p
  WHERE (
    NULLIF('{{ $json.person_id || '' }}', '') IS NOT NULL
    AND p.id = NULLIF('{{ $json.person_id || '' }}', '')::uuid
  )
  OR (
    NULLIF('{{ $json.phone || '' }}', '') IS NOT NULL
    AND p.primary_phone = NULLIF('{{ $json.phone || '' }}', '')
  )
  ORDER BY CASE
    WHEN NULLIF('{{ $json.person_id || '' }}', '') IS NOT NULL
      AND p.id = NULLIF('{{ $json.person_id || '' }}', '')::uuid THEN 0
    ELSE 1
  END
  LIMIT 1
),
payload AS (
  SELECT
    NULLIF(BTRIM('{{ $fromAI("full_name", "Nome completo corrigido do contato; opcional", "string") }}'), '') AS full_name,
    NULLIF(LOWER(BTRIM('{{ $fromAI("email", "Email valido do contato; opcional", "string") }}')), '') AS email,
    CASE LOWER(NULLIF(BTRIM('{{ $fromAI("intent", "buy, sell, rent ou unknown; opcional", "string") }}'), ''))
      WHEN 'buy' THEN 'buy'
      WHEN 'sell' THEN 'sell'
      WHEN 'rent' THEN 'rent'
      WHEN 'unknown' THEN 'unknown'
      ELSE NULL
    END AS intent,
    NULLIF(BTRIM('{{ $fromAI("crm_status", "Nova etapa comercial do contato; opcional", "string") }}'), '') AS crm_status
), updated AS (
  UPDATE public.people p
  SET
    full_name = COALESCE(payload.full_name, p.full_name),
    email = COALESCE(payload.email, p.email),
    crm_status = COALESCE(payload.crm_status, p.crm_status),
    metadata = CASE
      WHEN payload.intent IS NOT NULL THEN jsonb_set(COALESCE(p.metadata, '{}'::jsonb), '{latest_real_estate_intent}', to_jsonb(payload.intent), true)
      ELSE COALESCE(p.metadata, '{}'::jsonb)
    END,
    updated_at = now()
  FROM current_person cp, payload
  WHERE p.id = cp.id
  RETURNING p.id, p.full_name, p.primary_phone, p.email, p.crm_status, p.metadata
)
SELECT
  id,
  full_name,
  primary_phone,
  email,
  crm_status,
  COALESCE(metadata->>'latest_real_estate_intent', metadata->'lead_profile'->>'intent') AS intent,
  metadata->'lead_profile' AS lead_profile
FROM updated;

parameters.toolDescription: Use para recuperar historico mais antigo e seguro do contato atual. Retorna apenas mensagens do thread atual e notes ai visiveis para a Mariana. Use quando precisar lembrar perguntas ja feitas, respostas ja dadas, combinados anteriores, contexto antigo ou fatos relevantes antes de responder. Tambem use quando o lead disser que ja informou algo antes ou quando houver risco de repetir pergunta.
parameters.query:
WITH current_person AS (
  SELECT p.*
  FROM public.people p
  WHERE (
    NULLIF('{{ $json.person_id || '' }}', '') IS NOT NULL
    AND p.id = NULLIF('{{ $json.person_id || '' }}', '')::uuid
  )
  OR (
    NULLIF('{{ $json.phone || '' }}', '') IS NOT NULL
    AND p.primary_phone = NULLIF('{{ $json.phone || '' }}', '')
  )
  ORDER BY CASE
    WHEN NULLIF('{{ $json.person_id || '' }}', '') IS NOT NULL
      AND p.id = NULLIF('{{ $json.person_id || '' }}', '')::uuid THEN 0
    ELSE 1
  END
  LIMIT 1
),
current_thread AS (
  SELECT ct.*
  FROM public.chat_threads ct
  WHERE (
    NULLIF('{{ $json.thread_id || '' }}', '') IS NOT NULL
    AND ct.thread_id = NULLIF('{{ $json.thread_id || '' }}', '')
  )
  OR (
    (SELECT id FROM current_person LIMIT 1) IS NOT NULL
    AND ct.person_id = (SELECT id FROM current_person LIMIT 1)
  )
  ORDER BY CASE
    WHEN NULLIF('{{ $json.thread_id || '' }}', '') IS NOT NULL
      AND ct.thread_id = NULLIF('{{ $json.thread_id || '' }}', '') THEN 0
    ELSE 1
  END,
  ct.updated_at DESC NULLS LAST
  LIMIT 1
),
params AS (
  SELECT
    NULLIF(BTRIM('{{ $fromAI("search_text", "Termo opcional para localizar um assunto especifico em mensagens antigas ou notes ai, como casa, apartamento, visita, financiamento ou bairro", "string") }}'), '') AS search_text,
    CASE
      WHEN NULLIF(BTRIM('{{ $fromAI("before_created_at", "Data e hora ISO 8601 opcional para buscar mensagens anteriores a um ponto especifico do historico", "string") }}'), '') ~ '^[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}T'
      THEN NULLIF(BTRIM('{{ $fromAI("before_created_at", "Data e hora ISO 8601 opcional para buscar mensagens anteriores a um ponto especifico do historico", "string") }}'), '')::timestamptz
      ELSE NULL
    END AS before_created_at,
    LEAST(
      GREATEST(
        COALESCE(
          CASE
            WHEN NULLIF(BTRIM('{{ $fromAI("message_limit", "Quantidade de mensagens a retornar, entre 6 e 30", "string") }}'), '') ~ '^[0-9]+$'
            THEN NULLIF(BTRIM('{{ $fromAI("message_limit", "Quantidade de mensagens a retornar, entre 6 e 30", "string") }}'), '')::int
            ELSE NULL
          END,
          12
        ),
        6
      ),
      30
    ) AS message_limit,
    LEAST(
      GREATEST(
        COALESCE(
          CASE
            WHEN NULLIF(BTRIM('{{ $fromAI("note_limit", "Quantidade de notes ai a retornar, entre 3 e 12", "string") }}'), '') ~ '^[0-9]+$'
            THEN NULLIF(BTRIM('{{ $fromAI("note_limit", "Quantidade de notes ai a retornar, entre 3 e 12", "string") }}'), '')::int
            ELSE NULL
          END,
          6
        ),
        3
      ),
      12
    ) AS note_limit
),
note_rows AS (
  SELECT
    note->>'content' AS content,
    COALESCE(note->>'updatedAt', note->>'createdAt') AS happened_at,
    COALESCE(note->>'author', 'Equipe Novian') AS author
  FROM current_person cp
  CROSS JOIN params
  CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(COALESCE(cp.metadata->'lead_notes', '[]'::jsonb)) AS note
  WHERE COALESCE(note->>'visibility', '') = 'ai'
    AND NULLIF(BTRIM(COALESCE(note->>'content', '')), '') IS NOT NULL
    AND (
      params.search_text IS NULL
      OR note->>'content' ILIKE '%' || params.search_text || '%'
    )
  ORDER BY COALESCE(note->>'updatedAt', note->>'createdAt', '') DESC
  LIMIT (SELECT note_limit FROM params)
),
message_candidates AS (
  SELECT
    cm.created_at,
    cm.role,
    cm.agent,
    cm.content
  FROM current_thread ct
  CROSS JOIN params
  JOIN public.chat_messages cm ON cm.thread_id = ct.thread_id
  WHERE COALESCE(cm.is_system, false) = false
    AND NULLIF(BTRIM(COALESCE(cm.content, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
    AND (
      params.before_created_at IS NULL
      OR cm.created_at < params.before_created_at
    )
    AND (
      params.search_text IS NULL
      OR cm.content ILIKE '%' || params.search_text || '%'
      OR COALESCE(cm.agent, '') ILIKE '%' || params.search_text || '%'
      OR COALESCE(cm.role, '') ILIKE '%' || params.search_text || '%'
    )
  ORDER BY cm.created_at DESC
  LIMIT (SELECT message_limit FROM params)
),
message_rows AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM message_candidates
  ORDER BY created_at ASC
)
SELECT
  (SELECT id FROM current_person LIMIT 1) AS person_id,
  (SELECT thread_id FROM current_thread LIMIT 1) AS thread_id,
  COALESCE((SELECT search_text FROM params), '') AS search_text_used,
  (SELECT before_created_at FROM params) AS before_created_at_used,
  COALESCE((SELECT count(*) FROM note_rows), 0) AS note_count,
  COALESCE((SELECT count(*) FROM message_rows), 0) AS message_count,
  COALESCE((
    SELECT jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object(
      'content', nr.content,
      'author', nr.author,
      'happened_at', nr.happened_at
    ))
    FROM note_rows nr
  ), '[]'::jsonb) AS notes_ai_history,
  COALESCE((
    SELECT jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object(
      'created_at', mr.created_at,
      'role', mr.role,
      'agent', mr.agent,
      'content', LEFT(mr.content, 1200)
    ))
    FROM message_rows mr
  ), '[]'::jsonb) AS chat_messages_history;

WITH requested AS (
  SELECT NULLIF(BTRIM('{{ $json.delivery_reference || '' }}'), '') AS reference
), matched_property AS (
  SELECT p.*
  FROM public.properties p
  CROSS JOIN requested r
  WHERE p.status = 'active'
    AND r.reference IS NOT NULL
    AND (
      p.id::text = r.reference
      OR COALESCE(p.slug, '') ILIKE r.reference
      OR COALESCE(p.slug, '') ILIKE '%' || r.reference || '%'
      OR COALESCE(p.title, '') ILIKE '%' || r.reference || '%'
      OR COALESCE(p.address, '') ILIKE '%' || r.reference || '%'
    )
  ORDER BY
    CASE WHEN p.id::text = (SELECT reference FROM requested) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
    CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.slug, '') ILIKE (SELECT reference FROM requested) THEN 1 ELSE 2 END,
    p.updated_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  (SELECT id FROM matched_property LIMIT 1) AS property_id,
  (SELECT title FROM matched_property LIMIT 1) AS property_title,
  CASE
    WHEN COALESCE((SELECT cover_image FROM matched_property LIMIT 1), '') <> ''
      THEN (SELECT cover_image FROM matched_property LIMIT 1)
    ELSE NULL
  END AS cover_image,
  COALESCE(
    (SELECT to_jsonb(COALESCE(images, ARRAY[]::text[])) FROM matched_property LIMIT 1),
    '[]'::jsonb
  ) AS images;
